task.name: td CLI Operations
task.objective: Provide reusable td CLI operations for BMAD-td integration workflows

llm.mandate: Always run `td usage --new-session` at the START of any td-integration workflow
Use `td ws` commands when implementing multiple related issues
Always create handoff before review: `td handoff`
Reviews must be done in a DIFFERENT session than implementation

operation.name: Create td Epic for Story
operation.description: Creates a td epic to represent a BMAD story

inputs.input: Path to the BMAD story file

outputs.output: The created td epic ID (e.g., td-abc123)

execution.action: Construct epic title: "Story {epic_num}.{story_num}: {story_title}"
Construct epic body using td-field-schema.yaml template
Build tags: "bmad,epic,epic-{epic_num}"
execution.command: td add "{epic_title}" --type epic --tag bmad --tag epic --tag "epic-{epic_num}" \ --body "{epic_body}" \ --metadata story_file="{story_file_path}" \ --metadata epic_num="{epic_num}"
execution.action: Parse response to extract td_epic_id
Store td_epic_id for subsequent operations

example.command: td add "Story 1.2: User Authentication" --type epic --tag bmad --tag epic --tag epic-1 \ --body "..." --metadata story_file="_bmad-output/stories/1-2-user-auth.md"

operation.name: Create td Issue for Task
operation.description: Creates a td issue as child of an epic, representing a story task

inputs.input: Path to the BMAD story file
List of td issue IDs this depends on

execution.action: Construct issue body with task context
Build tags: "bmad,task"
execution.command: td add "{task_description}" --parent {parent_epic_id} --tag bmad --tag task \ --body "{issue_body}" \ --metadata story_file="{story_file_path}" \ --metadata task_index="{task_index}"

check.action: Add --depends-on flag with comma-separated issue IDs

execution.action: Parse response to extract td_issue_id

operation.name: Create td Issues for All Story Tasks
operation.description: Creates td issues for all tasks in a story, handling dependencies

inputs.input: List of tasks with descriptions and dependencies
Path to the BMAD story file

outputs.output: Map of task indices to td issue IDs

execution.action: Initialize empty task_mapping dictionary
Initialize empty dependency_registry dictionary

iterate.action: Parse task description for dependency hints: "(depends: task-N)"

check.action: Resolve dependency task numbers to td_issue_ids from dependency_registry

iterate.action: Add entry to task_mapping: task_index → td_issue_id
Add entry to dependency_registry: task_index → td_issue_id

operation.name: Start td Session for Story Work
operation.description: Initializes a td session for working on story tasks

operation.name: Start td Work Session
operation.description: Creates a td workspace for tracking multiple related issues

execution.action: Store workspace ID for subsequent ws operations

operation.name: Get Next Ready Task
operation.description: Gets the highest priority ready task for a story

inputs.input: td epic ID for the story

outputs.output: td issue ID of next ready task

execution.action: Parse response to find first open issue
If multiple open issues, check dependencies
Return first issue with no unmet dependencies

operation.name: Start Working on td Issue
operation.description: Marks a td issue as in_progress

operation.name: Complete td Issue
operation.description: Creates handoff and submits td issue for review

execution.action: Initialize handoff_args = []

operation.name: Sync Story Status to td
operation.description: Updates td epic and issues to match story file state

execution.action: Load story file and parse td Integration section
Get current td state: td show {epic_id}
Compare story status with td epic status

check.if: story status is 'done' and td status is not 'closed'

execution.action: For each task in task_mapping, sync checkbox state to td issue status

operation.name: Sync td Status to Story
operation.description: Updates story file to match td state

execution.action: Parse response to get all child issues with statuses
Load story file

iterate.action: Find matching task in story by td reference
Map td status to checkbox state using status-mapping
Update task checkbox in story file

execution.action: Update Last Sync timestamp in td Integration section
Save story file

operation.name: Detect Sync Drift
operation.description: Compares story file state with td state to detect discrepancies

execution.action: Load story file and parse task states
Parse td issue states
For each task with td reference:

check.if: story task is [x] but td issue is not closed
story task is [ ] but td issue is closed

operation.name: Approve td Epic (Complete Story)
operation.description: Closes td epic after successful story review

execution.critical: MUST be called from a different session than implementation

operation.name: Create td Issues for Review Findings
operation.description: Creates td issues for code review findings that need fixes

execution.action: Initialize review_issue_ids = []

iterate.action: Construct issue body with file:line references

operation.name: Get td Epic Status Summary
operation.description: Gets status summary of all tasks in an epic

execution.action: Parse response and count by status: - open_count - in_progress_count - review_count - blocked_count - closed_count

operation.name: Get Blocking Issues
operation.description: Gets list of issues blocking progress on a story
